commandsRun: manual smoke: exec session-smoke powershell -Command "Invoke-WebRequest https://example.com" --output json
outcomes: Shared daemon launch discovery now works for both CLI start and shim auto-start, with override env vars plus fallback to sibling daemon binaries or the source project.
Shim execution now retries daemon connection during auto-start and returns a clear daemon-unavailable error instead of failing silently after a single fixed wait.
CLI session list text mode now includes active state, timestamps, working directory, and policy path so the command is usable without JSON parsing.
CLI status now reports daemon working directory and process name, and docs now match the implemented start/stop/exec/session behavior.
Added focused tests for daemon launch resolution and text session listing, and the full targeted build/test/manual validation passed on Windows.
remainingWithinBatch: No additional Batch 2 items remain after the implemented runtime and docs alignment work.

selectedBatch.expectedOutcome: Supported non-interactive execution paths are more coherent from shim to CLI to daemon, and the docs describe those paths precisely.
selectedBatch.goal: Make the actual shim/daemon execution path more usable and explicit for supported scenarios, especially around PowerShell command routing, session flow, and installation/status behavior.
selectedBatch.name: Batch 2 - Shim and daemon usability completion
